title: paeonia × suffruticosa subsp. ostii
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa subsp. ostii, also known as the Chinese tree peony, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is also known to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of Paeonia × suffruticosa subsp. ostii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
